name: Alice Mod
description: Alice Mod — Fabric adapter for Java Edition, providing AI-driven bot control and game interaction capabilities. Supports addon mods via the 'alice-mod:plugin' custom entrypoint.

custom.alice-mod:plugin: 自定义入口点 — 附属模组实现 io.alice.mod.adapter.api.AliceToolPlugin 接口以注册自定义工具
